description: Catchem default capability set — narrowed to what JS actually invokes. Audit grep before adding: no @tauri-apps imports, no invoke() calls, no window.__TAURI access anywhere in frontend/ or desktop/catchem/web/ (2026-05-20). All sidecar lifecycle + external-link hand-off happens in Rust, not JS, so the JS-callable surface is intentionally tiny. v30 task #112 (multi-window) also covered by core:webview:default so dynamically-created secondary windows inherit IPC permissions without re-listing.
